cases.prompt_body: Historically recognizable exterior Challenger breakup at high altitude above Earth in a restrained side-view documentary frame, the shuttle stack is no longer intact, the orbiter separates from the rust-orange external tank, the twin white solid rocket boosters diverge outward, and a dense branching white-gray breakup plume blooms between the separating components, the main breakup geometry reads clearly before any small debris, NASA-reference realism, no intact launch stack, no pad plume, no liftoff portrait, no mission-control framing, no poster blast, cool daylight, ash gray, smoke white, charcoal, signal ember, severe documentary stillness
